landing.title: Operation Getaway
landing.subtitle: The courier found you. The portal is open. Somewhere in this firm your crew is waiting — scattered, scrambled, hiding in plain sight. Time to assemble.

vibe.title: Quick vibe check. No wrong answers, promise.
vibe.subtitle: The door is right there. First, tell us what kind of adventurer showed up today.

questions.prompt: If this were a movie, it's a…

signIn.title: Sign in to begin.
signIn.subtitle: It just tells the mission who you are — so we can point you to your crew. No passwords today.
signIn.pickLabel: Demo mode · pick your name to step in

brief.title: If you choose to accept it.
brief.quote: Listen closely, recruit. Your crew isn't who you sit with every day — I've scrambled finance, HR, ops and IT into something new. You'll find them not by their desk, but by what makes them them. The quirks. The hobbies. The little legends. Light up every canister on your wheel, and the real adventure begins.

guess.title: Guess your crew.
guess.subtitle: Each clue describes one of your teammates. Match it to the right colleague — every correct call lights a canister on your team's wheel, live, for everyone.
guess.completeSubtitle: Your wheel is whole and the centre is lit. Stand by, recruit — the next transmission is already on its way.
